creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
Hi!
I think the reason is not ccache or distcc - there really is not
declared identifier "NAME_MAX" - he was not declared in my system
CURRENT in <limits.h>.
Also will need the same fix in the /src/text/filesystem.c "NAME_MAX" to
"_POSIX_HOST_NAME_MAX"
There is only "FILENAME_MAX" in src/libvlc.h...
In another file identifier "_POSIX_HOST_NAME_MAX" have just described is
not the header file in which it is defined, namely <limits .h>.
I think that my fixes are correct.

Thanks!
